## Overview

This document provides the supplementary material accompanying our study, The collapse of environmental predictability erodes reproductive success in a tropical seabird. It includes additional methodological details, model-fitting workflows, diagnostic checks, model comparisons, sensitivity analyses, and supporting code/outputs.

To ensure transparency and reproducibility, we also provide the complete datasets (in `.csv` format) and fitted statistical models (as `.rds` files) in the public repository.
::: card
Contents

Main analyses

- S1. Chlorophyll-a bloom detection

- S2. Phenological mismatches

- S3. Model fitting workflow

- S4. Model diagnostics and selection

- S5. Model comparison

- S6. Full model summaries

Appendices

- Sensitivity analyses: Bloom threshold definition

- Code for figures

:::
